since_last: 55% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.44%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.35% · BTC -1.29% · Gold -3.54% · Nasdaq100 +0.48%. 55% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.44%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.44%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.29%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: RXRX is the standout at +5.22%
cards.body: Leaders: RXRX +5.22%, PINS +2.30%, TER +2.07%, AVGO +1.89%, MU +1.83%. Laggards: QCOM -3.21%, SMR -2.67%, IBM -2.36%, AVAV -2.04%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.15% at $155.88
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
